'''Skone II''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Skone system/Legends|Skone system]] of [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]], located in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]. The planet was capable of [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuff]] production and had manufacturing capabilities.<ref name="FBS" />

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the wider Skone system was heavily restricted by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] due to the presence of an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] staging zone. Despite the security, the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] established a [[listening post]] on the planet to [[Spy/Legends|spy]] on Imperial activities in the staging area.<ref name="FBS" />
